Grammarly vs Notion AI (2026): Which Should You Use?

Grammarly and Notion AI are both popular tools in the AI Writing Tools space. Here's how they compare.

GrammarlyNotion AI
MakerGrammarly Inc.Notion Labs
PricingFree plan available; Premium from $12/moAdd-on from $8-10/user/mo on top of a Notion plan
Free tierYesNo
Best forEveryday proofreading and tone-checking across any app.Teams already using Notion who want built-in AI search and writing.

Grammarly

AI-powered grammar, tone, and clarity checker with a generative writing assistant.

Notion AI

AI features built directly into the Notion workspace for notes, docs, and databases.
